over_200_points: Once a player goes over 200 points, they're highlighted as the winner. If multiple players score over 200 in the final round, the player with the most points is 1st place winner, with 2nd and 3rd place also up for grabs.
the_aim_of_flip7: The aim of Flip7 is to score over 200 points.
scoring_text: To begin, {#link1 to=|/players|}add players{/link1}. You can change the order of players with the {#iconArrowUpOutline}{/iconArrowUpOutline} and {#iconArrowDownOutline}{/iconArrowDownOutline} buttons. You can also edit the players' names and score on this page. Once all the players are set up, return to the {#link2 to=|/|}main screen{/link2}.
light_dark_mode: You can toggle between light and dark mode with the {#iconLightbulbOutline}{/iconLightbulbOutline} button.
language_toggle: The 🇬🇧/🇪🇸 button will toggle between English and Spanish.
